set.body: Define a capability-parity matrix against MATLAB and SciPy spectral routines: dense eig/eigh/svd/gsvd, sparse eigs/eigsh/svds, generalized eigenproblems, QZ-style generalized nonsymmetric support, shift-invert modes, left/right eigenvectors, selection by order/index/value, and convergence/failure semantics, translated into Gale's typed API rather than cloned syntax.
set.title: Define MATLAB/SciPy spectral parity matrix
